prompts: Cinematic shot in a warm, wood-paneled Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ari Dawncrest, a mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags and neat gloves, holds a sealed quest parcel with both hands, extending it towards Ari Silverbrook, a guild coordinator in a formal cloak. The camera is steady, capturing the focused expressions and the start of the handoff. No text, no watermarks, warm anime lighting.

Continuing the same cinematic shot in the guild hall. Ari Silverbrook, the guild coordinator, carefully accepts the sealed quest parcel from Ari Dawncrest. Both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to each other to complete the handoff. The background remains a lively, warm-lit RPG guild. Consistent character appearances, no text, no watermarks, high-quality anime art style.
